scripts.dev: concurrently "npm run dev --prefix frontend" "npm run dev --prefix backend"
scripts.install:all: npm install --prefix frontend && npm install --prefix backend
scripts.security:audit: npm --prefix backend audit --audit-level=moderate && npm --prefix frontend audit --audit-level=moderate
scripts.security:audit:prod: npm --prefix backend audit --omit=dev --audit-level=moderate && npm --prefix frontend audit --omit=dev --audit-level=moderate
